cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out step by step. So, the question is about Jane's birthday and calculating a date 10 days before that. Let me start by understanding the problem. First, Jane was born on the last day of February in 2001. Wait, the last day of February is the 28th in a non-leap year and the 29th in a leap year. But 2001 isn't a leap year because leap years are divisible by 4. 2000 was a leap year, then 2004. So 2001's February had 28 days.
